prompt:
A notebook page on a small outdoor observing table, showing a pencil sketch of the Big Dipper and two pointer lines leading toward a marked point representing Polaris. A compact compass and a simple inclinometer sit beside the notebook, implying azimuth and orientation measurements; the page contains only illegible scribbles, no readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future night-sky kit aesthetic: soft low-light illumination, gentle contrast, no brand logos, no readable text, no UI overlays. Compose so the star sketch and pointer lines are instantly recognizable at icon size.
